description: Issue #343 public SAMPLE playbook gold fixture: counterparty rewords the Limitation on Liability section so both required tokens ('$10,000' and 'aggregate liability') are gone. Must fire preserve-sample-liability-cap.

planted_variation.altered_hunk: Neither party shall be liable to the other for any indirect damages arising from a sample.
planted_variation.notes: Altered hunk omits both required_tokens ('$10,000' and 'aggregate liability') protected by preserve-sample-liability-cap.

authorship_note: Authored fresh for issue #343's public SAMPLE playbook -- fully invented fictional 'Sample Agreement' content, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required.
